_comment: Pterodactyl egg — 5-RANGER-MkDocs. Pulls installer + runtime from raw.githubusercontent.com/Gibsx/5-RANGER-MkDocs/main so no PAT is needed to bootstrap; the only PAT the container holds is the content-repo one (RANGER-AIDE-MEMOIRE) supplied via the TOKEN env var. See https://github.com/Gibsx/5-RANGER-MkDocs for the puller source.
name: Ranger Aide Memoire (MkDocs Material)
author: noreply@5ranger.local
description: Mirrors a GitHub markdown content repo (Gibsx/RANGER-AIDE-MEMOIRE) into an MkDocs Material site. Polls the content branch every SYNC_INTERVAL seconds; on a new commit it rebuilds the site in-place. Serves the built site via Python's stdlib http.server on the allocated Pterodactyl port.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# 5-RANGER-MkDocs installer — runs inside Pterodactyl's install container
# (installer image: ghcr.io/pterodactyl/installers:debian). Writes the
# runtime files to /mnt/server, which is remounted as /home/container at
# run time.
set -euo pipefail

apt-get update
apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl rsync python3 python3-pip ca-certificates

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# Pull runtime from the public puller repo. No PAT needed — the repo is
# intentionally public so the egg can bootstrap without a second token.
BASE="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Gibsx/5-RANGER-MkDocs/main"
for f in entry.py sync.py _common.py; do
    echo "Fetching $f"
    curl -fsSL "$BASE/$f" -o "$f"
done

# Python deps. Pinned loosely — upstream Material is stable; pymdown and
# pyyaml are transitive but listed explicitly for clarity.
pip3 install --no-cache-dir \
    mkdocs \
    mkdocs-material \
    pymdown-extensions \
    pyyaml \
    requests

# Fix ownership so the container user (uid 988 on yolks) can read/write.
chown -R 988:988 /mnt/server || true

echo 'Install complete. Set REPO, TOKEN (and optionally BRANCH / SYNC_INTERVAL / SITE_NAME / SITE_DESCRIPTION) before starting.'

variables.name: Content repo
variables.description: GitHub repo holding manifest.yaml + NN-slug.md files. Format: owner/repo.

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Branch of the content repo to track.

variables.name: GitHub PAT
variables.description: Personal access token with Contents: Read on the content repo. Fine-grained token recommended.

variables.name: Sync interval (seconds)
variables.description: How often to poll GitHub for a new commit. One cheap API call per tick in steady state.

variables.name: Site name
variables.description: Rendered as the browser tab title and top-bar heading.

variables.name: Site description
variables.description: Used for <meta name="description">. Keep under ~160 chars for search engines.
variables.default_value: 5th Battalion, Ranger Regiment — doctrine, SOPs, and field craft.
